untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires precise geometric measurement of cup depth (17.70%-27.84% of breakout price), saucer bottom formation, and handle retracement—multi-day structural geometry that cannot be reliably encoded with point-in-time indicators. Formation length rules (69-101 days) and volume trend classification (rising vs falling) require lookback window analysis beyond available indicators. Exact stop/target rules are silent in source pattern.
